The component is self-contained, but I want one more pass through nearby model patterns before recommending an extraction shape. I’m checking whether the UI package already has a `*Model` convention I should align with.
I have the main seams. I’m doing one last grep for browser globals so the extraction notes are pinned to every direct `window`/`document`/`history` call, not just the obvious ones.

**Best Seams**
- `Desktop runtime + launch-route polling` is the cleanest first extraction. The browser/Tauri coupling is concentrated at [AppShell.svelte#L114](~/opensession/packages/ui/src/components/AppShell.svelte#L114), [AppShell.svelte#L130](~/opensession/packages/ui/src/components/AppShell.svelte#L130), and [AppShell.svelte#L152](~/opensession/packages/ui/src/components/AppShell.svelte#L152), including `window.location`, timers, and `invoke`. Put this behind `ShellModel` deps like `detectDesktopRuntime()`, `readCurrentPath()`, `takeLaunchRoute()`, `startInterval()`, `stopInterval()`, and `navigate(path)`.
- `Navigation state and route actions` are the next highest-value seam. The decision logic is already separate from markup at [AppShell.svelte#L40](~/opensession/packages/ui/src/components/AppShell.svelte#L40), [AppShell.svelte#L62](~/opensession/packages/ui/src/components/AppShell.svelte#L62), [AppShell.svelte#L64](~/opensession/packages/ui/src/components/AppShell.svelte#L64), [AppShell.svelte#L121](~/opensession/packages/ui/src/components/AppShell.svelte#L121), [AppShell.svelte#L374](~/opensession/packages/ui/src/components/AppShell.svelte#L374), [AppShell.svelte#L488](~/opensession/packages/ui/src/components/AppShell.svelte#L488), and [AppShell.svelte#L496](~/opensession/packages/ui/src/components/AppShell.svelte#L496). A model can own `navLinks`, `showLoginLink`, `isLinkActive()`, `signOut()`, and `navigateTo()`.
- `Palette/search` is worth extracting, but only the pure part. The command catalog, filtering, and selection logic live at [AppShell.svelte#L264](~/opensession/packages/ui/src/components/AppShell.svelte#L264), [AppShell.svelte#L278](~/opensession/packages/ui/src/components/AppShell.svelte#L278), [AppShell.svelte#L346](~/opensession/packages/ui/src/components/AppShell.svelte#L346), [AppShell.svelte#L358](~/opensession/packages/ui/src/components/AppShell.svelte#L358), [AppShell.svelte#L454](~/opensession/packages/ui/src/components/AppShell.svelte#L454), and [AppShell.svelte#L466](~/opensession/packages/ui/src/components/AppShell.svelte#L466). Keep DOM focus in the component at [AppShell.svelte#L393](~/opensession/packages/ui/src/components/AppShell.svelte#L393), and replace the direct `window.dispatchEvent` at [AppShell.svelte#L274](~/opensession/packages/ui/src/components/AppShell.svelte#L274) with an injected `focusSearch()` dep.
- `Do not extract the DOM-heavy helpers first.` `trapHelpFocus()` and the outside-click handler at [AppShell.svelte#L414](~/opensession/packages/ui/src/components/AppShell.svelte#L414) and [AppShell.svelte#L446](~/opensession/packages/ui/src/components/AppShell.svelte#L446) are tightly coupled to element refs and `document`. Keep them local for now; only replace `history.back()` at [AppShell.svelte#L547](~/opensession/packages/ui/src/components/AppShell.svelte#L547) with a `goBack()` dep.

**Low-Risk Strategy**
- Follow the existing getter/setter model pattern already used by [session-list-model.ts#L131](~/opensession/packages/ui/src/models/session-list-model.ts#L131) and [SessionListPage.svelte#L83](~/opensession/packages/ui/src/components/SessionListPage.svelte#L83). That lets `AppShell.svelte` keep its current `$state` variables and template bindings.
- Add `packages/ui/src/models/shell-model.ts` as a thin explicit model over existing state, not a rewrite. Start with browser-facing deps only: `navigate`, `goBack`, `focusSearch`, `readCurrentPath`, `detectDesktopRuntime`, `invokeDesktop`, `setInterval`, `clearInterval`, `logout`.
- Leave the template and `<svelte:window>` wiring at [AppShell.svelte#L552](~/opensession/packages/ui/src/components/AppShell.svelte#L552) largely intact. The component should become a thin host for refs (`paletteInput`, `helpDialog`, `accountMenuRoot`) while the model owns route/search/polling decisions.
- Defer the auth bootstrap effect at [AppShell.svelte#L205](~/opensession/packages/ui/src/components/AppShell.svelte#L205) to a later pass. It is broader than the targeted navigation/search/browser-global seam, so moving it now adds risk without much structural payoff.
